title: CSA S16-24 Bolt Group Capacity
description: Design bolt groups in accordance with CSA S16-24.

shape.description: Bolt Pattern. Symbol: \text{Pattern}. Bolt Pattern Shape.

diameter.description: Diameter. Symbol: \text{Diameter}. Units: mm. The diameter of the bolt pattern.

angle.description: Rotation. Symbol: \text{Angle}. Units: °. Angle to rotate the bolt pattern by. 0 degrees is defined to have a bolt at the top of the center of the circle.

circular_bolts.description: No. Bolts. Symbol: n. The number of bolts in the circular pattern.

s_c.description: sc. Symbol: s_c. Units: mm. Spacing of bolt columns (spacing in X).

s_r.description: sr. Symbol: s_r. Units: mm. Spacing of bolt rows (spacing in Y).

x_bolts.description: No. Bolt Columns. Symbol: n_c. The number of bolt columns (in X direction).

y_bolts.description: No. Bolt Rows. Symbol: n_r. The number of bolt rows (in Y direction).

bolts_table.description: Bolt Coordinates. Coordinates of all bolts to be considered.

edge_type.description: Edge Type. Symbol: \text{Edge}. Edge condition used to determine minimum edge distance per CSA S16-24 Table 5.

L_eh.description: Edge Distance (X). Symbol: L_{eh}. Units: mm. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in X direction.

L_ev.description: Edge Distance (Y). Symbol: L_{ev}. Units: mm. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Y direction.

L_ehl.description: Edge Distance (Xleft). Symbol: L_{eh,left}. Units: mm. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Xleft direction.

L_evb.description: Edge Distance (Ybottom). Symbol: L_{ev,bottom}. Units: mm. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Ybottom direction.

L_ehr.description: Edge Distance (Xright). Symbol: L_{eh,right}. Units: mm. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Xright direction.

L_evt.description: Edge Distance (Ytop). Symbol: L_{ev,top}. Units: mm. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Ytop direction.

plate_width.description: Plate Width (W). Symbol: W. Units: mm. Total Width of the plate (length in X).

plate_height.description: Plate Height (H). Symbol: H. Units: mm. Total Height of the plate (length in Y).

t.description: Plate Thickness (t). Symbol: t. Units: mm. Thickness of smallest steel plate in the connection.

grade.description: Bolt Grade. Symbol: \text{Grade}. Bolt grade per ASTM A307 & ASTM F3125 as referenced in CSA S16-24. Grade determines the ultimate tensile strength (Fu) of the bolt.

f_ub.description: Fub. Symbol: F_{ub}. Units: MPa. Effective tensile strength of bolt. Related to grade of bolt per ASTM F3125 (CSA S16-24).

shear_plane.description: Threads in Shear Plane. Symbol: \text{Threads}. Indicates whether the bolt threads intersect the shear plane per CSA S16-24 Cl. 13.12.1.2. If threads are included, shear resistance is reduced.

bolt_type.description: Bolt Type. Symbol: \text{Bolt Type}. Slip-critical or bearing type bolt per CSA S16-24 Cl. 13.12.

faying_surface.description: Faying Surface Class. Symbol: \text{Class}. Faying surface class per CSA S16-24 Table 3. Determines slip coefficient ks and resistance factor cs used in Cl. 13.12.2.2.Class A: Unpainted clean mill scale (ks = 0.30)Class B: Blast-cleaned with Class B coating (ks = 0.52)Class C: Hot-dipped galvanized (ks = 0.30)Class D: Metallized surfaces (ks = 0.45)
x-enumLabels: Class A - Unpainted clean mill scale
Class B - Blast-cleaned + Class B coating

plate_grade.description: Plate Grade. Symbol: \text{Plate Grade}. Plate grade per CSA G40.21. Grade determines the yield and ultimate tensile strength of the steel plate.

f_y.description: Fy. Symbol: F_{y}. Units: MPa. Yield strength of the steel plate per CSA G40.21.

f_u.description: Fu. Symbol: F_{u}. Units: MPa. Ultimate tensile strength of the steel plate per CSA G40.21.

U_t.description: Ut. Symbol: U_{t}. Block shear reduction coefficient per CSA S16-24 Cl. 13.11.

hole.description: Hole Type. Symbol: \text{Hole}. Bolt hole type per CSA S16-24 Table 5. Slotted holes only available for rectangular bolt pattern.

clearance.description: Nominal Hole Clearance. Symbol: clearance. Units: mm. Nominal hole clearance per CSA S16-24 Table 5. Standard clearance is 2 mm for bolts up to M24, and 3 mm for M27 and larger.

d_h.description: Hole Size (dh). Symbol: d_h. Units: mm. Diameter of bolt hole per CSA S16-24 Table 5.

d_l.description: Slot Length. Symbol: L. Units: mm. Length of slotted hole per CSA S16-24 Table 5.

prying_method.description: Prying Analysis. Symbol: \text{Prying}. Method for calculating the impact of prying on tensile loads. Must be supplied as simplified factor for circular and custom bolting arrangements.

prying_factor.description: Prying Factor (p). Symbol: p. Factor to account for prying effect by increasing tensile loads. A value of 1.1 may be suitable for rigid plates and a value of 1.2 to 1.4 may be suitable for flexible plates.

stub_thickness.description: Stub Thickness. Symbol: t_{stub}. Units: mm. Thickness of stub in mm considered for prying action calculation.

Fx.description: Fx. Symbol: F_x. Units: kN. Applied design action along X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fy.description: Fy. Symbol: F_y. Units: kN. Applied design action along Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fz.description: Fz. Symbol: F_z. Units: kN. Applied design action along Z-axis. A positive value is considered to apply tension to the bolts. A negative value is considered to apply compression.

Mx.description: Mx. Symbol: M_x. Units: kNm. Design moment about X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

My.description: My. Symbol: M_y. Units: kNm. Design moment about Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Mz.description: Mz. Symbol: M_z. Units: kNm. Design moment about Z-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

graph_on.description: Show Stress Graphs. Toggle on/off to show stress graphs in reporting. Disabling stress graphs will result in quicker solve times.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
